MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $284.02 FILED BY MAZZARELLA, SCOTT IND/DBA MAZZY'S FIRE AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, KIEM DBA NEW GOLDEN TURTLE RESTAURANT QUANG, MUOI IND/DBA NEW GOLDEN TURTLE RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAZZARELLA, SCOTT IND/DBA MAZZY'S FIRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUYNH, KIEM DBA NEW GOLDEN TURTLE RESTAURANT QUANG, MUOI IND/DBA NEW GOLDEN TURTLE RESTAURANT $276.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $336.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, KIEM DBA NEW GOLDEN TURTLE RESTAURANT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-25-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-19-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE QUANS AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-21-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE SETTLEMENT CHECK, NOAPPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 9-25-02 @ 1:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION W/ PREJUDICE
